# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

require 'sendgrid-ruby'

class SendGridMailer < ApplicationMailer
  include SendGrid

  default from: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_DEFAULT_FROM', 'noreply@example.com')

  def initialize
    super
    @sendgrid_api_key = ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_API_KEY', nil)
  end

  def welcome_email(user)
    @user = user
    @url = root_url

    if use_sendgrid?
      send_via_sendgrid(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: 'Welcome to Our Application',
        template_id: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_WELCOME_TEMPLATE_ID', nil),
        dynamic_template_data: {
          first_name: @user.first_name,
          url: @url
        }
      )
    else
      mail(to: @user.email, subject: 'Welcome to Our Application')
    end
  end

  def password_reset_email(user, reset_token)
    @user = user
    @reset_token = reset_token
    @reset_url = edit_password_reset_url(reset_token)

    if use_sendgrid?
      send_via_sendgrid(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: 'Password Reset Instructions',
        template_id: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_PASSWORD_RESET_TEMPLATE_ID', nil),
        dynamic_template_data: {
          first_name: @user.first_name,
          reset_url: @reset_url
        }
      )
    else
      mail(to: @user.email, subject: 'Password Reset Instructions')
    end
  end

  def notification_email(user, message, subject: 'Notification')
    @user = user
    @message = message

    if use_sendgrid?
      send_via_sendgrid(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: subject,
        content: @message,
        content_type: 'text/html'
      )
    else
      mail(to: @user.email, subject: subject, body: @message, content_type: 'text/html')
    end
  end

  def bulk_email(recipients, subject, body, categories: [])
    if use_sendgrid?
      send_bulk_via_sendgrid(
        recipients: recipients,
        subject: subject,
        content: body,
        categories: categories
      )
    else
      recipients.each do |recipient|
        mail(to: recipient[:email], subject: subject, body: body, content_type: 'text/html').deliver_now
      end
    end
  end

  private

  def use_sendgrid?
    @sendgrid_api_key.present? && !Rails.env.test?
  end

  def send_via_sendgrid(to:, subject:, template_id: nil, dynamic_template_data: nil, content: nil, content_type: 'text/html', categories: [], attachments_list: [])
    from_email = Email.new(email: default_params[:from])
    to_email = Email.new(email: to)
    mail_subject = subject

    sg_mail = Mail.new

    sg_mail.from = from_email
    sg_mail.subject = mail_subject

    personalization = Personalization.new
    personalization.add_to(to_email)

    if dynamic_template_data.present?
      dynamic_template_data.each do |key, value|
        personalization.add_dynamic_template_data(key.to_s => value)
      end
    end

    sg_mail.add_personalization(personalization)

    if template_id.present?
      sg_mail.template_id = template_id
    elsif content.present?
      sg_mail.add_content(Content.new(type: content_type, value: content))
    end

    categories.each do |category|
      sg_mail.add_category(Category.new(name: category))
    end

    attachments_list.each do |attachment_data|
      attachment = Attachment.new
      attachment.content = Base64.strict_encode64(attachment_data[:content])
      attachment.type = attachment_data[:type] || 'application/octet-stream'
      attachment.filename = attachment_data[:filename]
      attachment.disposition = attachment_data[:disposition] || 'attachment'
      sg_mail.add_attachment(attachment)
    end

    sg_mail.add_header(Header.new(key: 'X-Mailer', value: 'SendGridMailer'))

    tracking_settings = TrackingSettings.new
    click_tracking = ClickTracking.new
    click_tracking.enable = true
    tracking_settings.click_tracking = click_tracking

    open_tracking = OpenTracking.new
    open_tracking.enable = true
    tracking_settings.open_tracking = open_tracking

    sg_mail.tracking_settings = tracking_settings

    deliver_sendgrid_mail(sg_mail)
  end

  def send_bulk_via_sendgrid(recipients:, subject:, content:, categories: [])
    sg_mail = Mail.new
    sg_mail.from = Email.new(email: default_params[:from])
    sg_mail.subject = subject
    sg_mail.add_content(Content.new(type: 'text/html', value: content))

    recipients.each do |recipient|
      personalization = Personalization.new
      personalization.add_to(Email.new(email: recipient[:email], name: recipient[:name]))

      if recipient[:substitutions].present?
        recipient[:substitutions].each do |key, value|
          personalization.add_dynamic_template_data(key.to_s => value)
        end
      end

      sg_mail.add_personalization(personalization)
    end

    categories.each do |category|
      sg_mail.add_category(Category.new(name: category))
    end

    deliver_sendgrid_mail(sg_mail)
  end

  def deliver_sendgrid_mail(sg_mail)
    sg = SendGrid::API.new(api_key: @sendgrid_api_key)

    begin
      response = sg.client.mail._('send').post(request_body: sg_mail.to_json)

      if response.status_code.to_i >= 200 && response.status_code.to_i < 300
        Rails.logger.info("[SendGridMailer] Email sent successfully. Status: #{response.status_code}")
        response
      else
        Rails.logger.error("[SendGridMailer] Failed to send email. Status: #{response.status_code}, Body: #{response.body}")
        handle_sendgrid_error(response)
      end
    rescue StandardError => e
      Rails.logger.error("[SendGridMailer] Exception while sending email: #{e.message}")
      Rails.logger.error(e.backtrace.first(10).join("\n"))
      raise SendGridDeliveryError, "Failed to deliver email via SendGrid: #{e.message}"
    end
  end

  def handle_sendgrid_error(response)
    error_body = begin
      JSON.parse(response.body)
    rescue JSON::ParserError
      { 'errors' => [{ 'message' => response.body }] }
    end

    error_messages = error_body.fetch('errors', []).map { |e| e['message'] }.join(', ')

    case response.status_code.to_i
    when 401
      raise SendGridAuthenticationError, "SendGrid authentication failed: #{error_messages}"
    when 429
      raise SendGridRateLimitError, "SendGrid rate limit exceeded: #{error_messages}"
    when 400..499
      raise SendGridClientError, "SendGrid client error (#{response.status_code}): #{error_messages}"
    when 500..599
      raise SendGridServerError, "SendGrid server error (#{response.status_code}): #{error_messages}"
    else
      raise SendGridDeliveryError, "SendGrid delivery failed (#{response.status_code}): #{error_messages}"
    end
  end

  class SendGridDeliveryError < StandardError; end
  class SendGridAuthenticationError < SendGridDeliveryError; end
  class SendGridRateLimitError < SendGridDeliveryError; end
  class SendGridClientError < SendGridDeliveryError; end
  class SendGridServerError < SendGridDeliveryError; end
end
